title: brand-skills .brand/.scope.json
description: Optional pre-fill for .brandrc.yaml. Read once at SKILL §0a.5; merged into brandrc; deleted after successful Stage 0 completion. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-14-scope-json-design.md.

tier.description: Target completeness tier. Mirrors .brandrc.yaml's tier and matches the enum used by manifest.schema.json and health.schema.json.

mode.description: Init-mode that drives cli/src/commands/init.js TIER_FOR_MODE mapping. Note: the enum is intentionally different from tier (pitch instead of minimum); they are not interchangeable.

industry.description: Free-form descriptive prior (e.g. 'fast-food QSR', 'B2B SaaS analytics', 'luxury fashion ecommerce'). Stages 3 + 4 use it as a soft tie-breaker on inference and cite it inline. Mirrored field in .brandrc.yaml; same shape.

interactive_preflight.description: When false, the SKILL bails on missing required fields instead of asking conversationally. Embedded-mode hinge; see spec §3.
